title: The World Model Remembers, the Actor Forgets: Dream Rehearsal for Continual Model-Based RL
description: Code, pre-registration trail, and run data. DreamerV3-family agents forget catastrophically across task sequences, but the world model is not what forgets: representations, reward heads, and critics retain old-task knowledge while the actor collapses. Dream rehearsal - supervised self-imitation on the world model's own graded dreams - yields a task-label-free, parameter-constant continual learner: 3/3 retention on four- and eight-task MiniGrid chains where plain replay passes 0/3, outperforming matched real-episode cloning.
